channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] South Tampa mosquito spraying planned overnight Thursday: Hillsborough officials
item.description: Hillsborough County mosquito management crews plan to conduct overnight mosquito treatments across parts of the area by spraying Dibrom between 3:30 a.m. and 6 a.m.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Chiefs release first renderings of $3B domed stadium in Kansas City, Kansas
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs released renderings on Wednesday of what their new domed stadium in Kansas will look like.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Florida star RB Jadan Baugh explains why he stayed in Gainesville after coaching change
item.description: The All-SEC running back said a Christmas Day visit from new head coach Jon Sumrall was the moment that convinced him to remain a Florida Gator.

item.title: [BREAKING] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 2 injured after shooting inside Childs Park YMCA bathroom in St. Pete, police say
item.description: Police said two people are injured following a shooting inside a bathroom at the Childs Park YMCA in St. Petersburg.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] US attorney who Trump fired minutes after he got the job sues to get it back
item.description: A fired U.S. attorney is suing the Trump administration after being fired less than an hour after judges unanimously appointed him to the role.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Trump pays respects to 4 US service members killed in the Middle East
item.description: President Donald Trump on Wednesday honored the lives of four U.S. service members who were killed in the Middle East and returned to their families at an air force base in Delaware.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Tampa Bay 28's Denis Phillips to meet fans at Bolts Brew Fest this Saturday
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning are hosting their annual Bolts Brew Fest on Saturday, July 25, at Benchmark International Arena.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Tampa pharmacist found guilty of illegally dispensing more than 335,000 oxycodone pills: DOJ
item.description: A federal jury convicted a Tampa pharmacist and pharmacy owner of illegally distributing more than 335,000 high-dose oxycodone pills through two South Florida pharmacies, federal prosecutors announced.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] St. Petersburg police search for suspect after city worker, mother of 4 shot and killed
item.description: Investigators are searching for a suspect after a 47-year-old mother working for the city of St. Petersburg was shot and killed Wednesday in what officials believe was a targeted, possibly domestic, attack.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Polk County man accused of having sex with minor he brought home from Pennsylvania: 'He loved her'
item.description: A Polk City man was arrested Tuesday after being accused of having unlawful sex with a 16-year-old, among other charges, according to the sheriff’s office.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Florida’s new state budget funds five major Manatee County projects
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Rabies advisory issued in Sarasota after infected raccoon killed on Proctor Road
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] July Buck Moon coincides with Perseid meteor shower. When to look up
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Shark Week 2026 starts soon. Shark bite numbers in Florida
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Lt. Gov. Jay Collins courts Republican voters in Lakeland rally
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] How to watch the rescheduled White House Correspondents' Dinner Friday
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Powerball jumps to a whopping $567 million for Wednesday, July 22
[The Florida Channel] 7/22/26 Self-Insurance Estimating Conference: Risk Management
item.description: 7/22/26 Self-Insurance Estimating Conference: Risk Management first appeared on The Florida Channel 7/22/26 Self-Insurance Estimating Conference: Risk Management first appeared on The Florida Channel

item.title: [The Florida Channel] 7/22/26 Triumph Gulf Coast Board of Directors Meeting
item.description: 7/22/26 Triumph Gulf Coast Board of Directors Meeting first appeared on The Florida Channel 7/22/26 Triumph Gulf Coast Board of Directors Meeting first appeared on The Florida Channel

item.title: [The Florida Channel] 7/22/26 State Board of Education Meeting
item.description: 7/22/26 State Board of Education Meeting first appeared on The Florida Channel 7/22/26 State Board of Education Meeting first appeared on The Florida Channel

item.title: [The Florida Channel] 7/21/26 Capitol Update Extended – State Board of Immigration Enforcement Awards Reimbursements to Law Enforcement Agencies Throughout Florida
item.description: 7/21/26 Capitol Update Extended – State Board of Immigration Enforcement Awards Reimbursements to Law Enforcement Agencies Throughout Florida first appeared on The Florida Channel State CFO Blaise Ingoglia awarded reimbursements on behalf of the State Board of Immigration Enforcement. The board is comprised of the governor and cabinet and was created to ensure enforcement of federal immigration po

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Former USF head coach Alex Golesh, QB Byrum Brown back in Tampa at SEC Media Days
item.description: Former USF head football coach Alex Golesh and quarterback Byrum Brown returned to Tampa Bay for SEC Media Day, reflecting on the USF turnaround that launched both to the SEC.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Tampa Bay 28 Listens booth was in St. Petersburg; heard concerns related to flooding, schools and more
item.description: Tampa Bay 28 St. Petersburg and South Pinellas reporter Casey Albritton was at the Speer YMCA on July 20 and listened to you and the stories you think need to be covered in the area.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Researchers discover Earth-like planet with atmosphere 48 light-years away
item.description: Scientists discovered a rocky exoplanet with an atmosphere orbiting in a habitable zone, raising new questions about the potential for life.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Person shot in St. Pete; police on the scene
item.description: St. Petersburg police said a person was shot at the 4100 block of 12th Ave South on Wednesday, July 22.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Maduro trial date set for June 2027 as drug trafficking case against ousted Venezuelan leader proceeds
item.description: Ousted Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro appeared in a New York City court Wednesday as his drug trafficking case moves forward. A trial date was set for June 2027.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Judge approves a $1.5B Anthropic settlement over books used to train Claude
item.description: A federal judge has approved a $1.5 billion copyright settlement in which artificial intelligence company Anthropic will pay thousands of authors about $3,000 per book after using pirated copies of their works to train its Claude chatbot.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Malcolm-Jamal Warner's widow sues his mother over his estate
item.description: Malcolm-Jamal Warner's widow has filed a lawsuit against the actor's mother, who oversees his family trust, one year after his death.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Model recruiter who introduced young women to Jeffrey Epstein found dead in France
item.description: A French professional model recruiter who, for over a decade, arranged for the late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein to meet multiple models was found dead in his home near Paris on Monday.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] As the president touts Trump Accounts, some families are still waiting for money
item.description: President Donald Trump says Trump Accounts could hoist children out of poverty and give more Americans the chance to benefit from investments in the stock market. But some parents say they're still waiting for the money to arrive.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Deadly Clearwater Ferry crash: Passengers to receive $300K settlement from PSTA
item.description: A $300,000 settlement approved by the Pinellas Suncoast Transit Authority will be split among 37 passengers involved in a deadly April 2025 Clearwater Ferry crash near the Memorial Causeway.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Veterinarian Awareness: What Florida Dog Owners Should Know About Leptospirosis
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] More of Miami-Dade, Broward under severe drought conditions
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Miami now tops New York City as more expensive. It's having an impact
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida names new education commissioner

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Bucs to wear '76 jerseys for 2026 Creamsicle game
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers announced the team will once again wear the iconic white jerseys from 1976 during the annual "Creamsicle Game" on Dec. 6.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Historic West Virginia flooding washes out roads, knocks out 911 service as rescues continue
item.description: West Virginia's governor has declared a state of emergency for all 55 counties following historic flooding Tuesday from a storm that spawned tornadoes and damaging winds from Kentucky to New Jersey.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] NYC Legionnaires’ outbreak claims fifth life as source remains unknown
item.description: A fifth person has died in New York City’s Legionnaires’ outbreak as officials clean dozens of cooling towers and investigate the source.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Adolf Hitler's birthplace in Austria reopens as a police station to deter Nazi pilgrimages
item.description: Adolf Hitler's birthplace in Austria was officially inaugurated as a police station on Wednesday in an effort to destroy the building's appeal as a site of pilgrimage for people who glorify the Nazi dictator.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Florida memory care facility files for bankruptcy after $1.5M court judgment
item.description: A Pasco County memory care facility filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy weeks after a judge ordered it to pay a $1.5 million award to a resident's family in a wrongful death lawsuit.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Tampa film lab sees Gen Z fueling film photography comeback
item.description: In a world where most pictures live on phones, Coastal Film Lab is helping keep traditional photography alive.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Pasco County human-trafficking and prostitution ring leads to 8 arrests: Police
item.description: Eight people face criminal charges following a multi-day human trafficking and prostitution sting in Pasco County, authorities announced.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Suspect covered in blood punches Hernando County deputy in face as unconscious woman lies nearby: Sheriff
item.description: A deputy on proactive patrol was forced into a violent confrontation Tuesday while responding to a severe domestic dispute in the Riverdale neighborhood, according to the Hernando County Sheriff’s Office.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Sarasota County elections office urges voters to return mail ballots early ahead of Aug. 18 election
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Tampa pharmacist convicted of selling 300,000 oxycodone pills in South Florida
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] How much do you save by shopping during Florida's school tax holiday?
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] A rare Atlantic Niña and strong El Niño are shaping the weather ahead
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] How Florida's shark attack total stacks up against other states
